---
name: "Performance issue"
about: Report slow or inefficient parts of the plugin
title: "[PERF]"
labels: performance
---

### Describe the issue
What feels slow or unresponsive?

### Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Perform action '...'
3. Notice slowdown

### Expected performance
What would "fast enough" look like? (e.g. <1 second load, smooth scrolling)

### Actual results
- Approximate time taken: [e.g. 5-6 seconds]
- Frequency: [always / sometimes / rare]

### Device / environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24]
- Obsidian version: [e.g. 1.7.4]
- Plugin version: [e.g. 1.2.0]
- Shell: [e.g. PowerShell 7, bash, zsh]
- Hardware details (if relevant): [CPU, RAM]

### Additional context
Screenshots, recordings, or logs if helpful.
